# Invalid timestamp formats — all should be skipped with WARN
# start-timestamp, end-timestamp, video-name
0:10,0:30,Valid Clip Before Errors
99:99:99:99,1:00,Too Many Colons
abc,1:00,Letters In Timestamp
0:10,xyz,Letters In End Timestamp
,1:00,Empty Start
0:10,,Empty End
0:30,1:00,Valid Clip After Errors
